_meta.audit: Safety copy is the one place a calm caution is allowed — but it still makes NO medical claim, diagnosis, or promise. It points to professional help; it does not advise how to withdraw. Shown once, calmly, never repeated (MVP §6.7). ⚠️ REQUIRES licensed medical + legal review before ship — wording below is a drafting placeholder, not cleared copy.

alcoholWithdrawalNotice.context: Displayed once when an alcohol quit/reduce goal is created.
alcoholWithdrawalNotice.title: One thing worth knowing
alcoholWithdrawalNotice.body: For some people who drink heavily or daily, stopping suddenly can be physically risky. If that might be you, it's worth talking to a doctor or a helpline about the safest way to cut down. This app tracks your progress — it isn't medical care.

resourcesScreen.title: Support, whenever you want it
resourcesScreen.intro: These are free, confidential lines. You don't have to be in crisis to call.
resourcesScreen.footerDisclaimer: Ballast tracks habits and streaks. It is not a substitute for professional medical or mental-health care. If you're in immediate danger, call your local emergency number.

notMedicalCareDisclaimer: Ballast is a self-tracking tool, not medical or mental-health treatment. Milestones describe what people commonly report, not clinical outcomes.
